title: Liverpool Confirmed XI vs Wolves
fullText: Liverpool Confirmed XI vs WolvesLiverpool Confirmed Team News and XI vs WolvesLiverpool’s 5-2 win over West Ham United on Saturday saw them leapfrog Chelsea in the table, with the Reds now sitting fifth.After Aston Villa were beat by Wolves, Arne Slot’s side are just three points behind the Villains and Manchester United, who sit in fourth and third.AdvertisementNow their attention turns to tonight’s clash with Wolves, who sit bottom of the table after a horrific season.Team NewsArne Slot confirmed that Florian Wirtz is absent for this one, as he continues his recovery from a back injury.He joins Conor Bradley, Giovanni Leoni, Wataru Endo and Alexander Isak on the sidelines.Liverpool XI: Alisson, Frimpong, Konate, Van Dijk (C), Kerkez, Gravenberch, Mac Allister, Szoboszlai, Salah, Ekitike, Gakpo.Bench: Mamardashvili, Gomez, Robertson, Ramsay, Nyoni, Jones, Chiesa, Ngumoha, Morrison.
summary: Liverpool Confirmed Team News and XI vs WolvesLiverpool’s 5-2 win over West Ham United on Saturday saw them leapfrog Chelsea in the table, with the Reds now sitting fifth.After Aston Villa were beat...
